creator: kusumi.tomohiro@gmail.com
text:
This patch syncs HAMMER1/2 support with the latest DragonFly BSD.
I also removed unused code in FreeBSD's fstyp from hammer.c, which is two functions for fsvtyp vector.

https://www.dragonflybsd.org/~tkusumi/diff/freebsd/0001-usr.sbin-fstyp-Sync-with-DragonFly.patch
